S.FORM: Gbenga Akinnagbe kawas tay 1978, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 12, Gbenga Akinnagbe, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ɣβeŋa akinnaɣβe kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ɣβeŋa akinnaɣβe, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
